title: vepris teitensis
intro: Vepris teitensis, also known as the Iten Olive tree, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family native to Kenya and Ethiopia. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The medicinal properties of Vepris teitensis have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can contribute to various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, Vepris teitensis is often used as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various ailments.
